raw_output_payload.reasoning:
Need find /system/folder1 -type f -name '*.txt' ! -name 'keep.txt' -mmin +5 -delete

But ensure not delete keep.txt. Use -not -name 'keep.txt'. So command: find /system/folder1 -type f -name '*.txt' ! -name 'keep.txt' -mmin +5 -delete

Return that.
